target_rules: Preserve the source object name exactly unless the source SQL explicitly renames it.
Prefer explicit CREATE statements with valid SQL Server syntax.

unsupported_object_types.event: SQL Server does not support MySQL EVENT objects directly. Convert them manually to SQL Server Agent jobs or orchestration.
unsupported_object_types.cursor: Standalone cursor objects are not supported as migratable objects for SQL Server in this tool.

table: Preserve source business column names and primary key intent when possible.
Use valid SQL Server identifier quoting and data types.
trigger: Convert MySQL trigger syntax to a SQL Server CREATE TRIGGER statement. Do not convert a trigger into a procedure.
storedprocedure: Convert MySQL procedure syntax to valid SQL Server CREATE PROCEDURE syntax.
function: Convert MySQL function syntax to valid SQL Server CREATE FUNCTION syntax.
